testFiles.description: Unit tests for the hint registry single source of truth

tests.name: Every entry has non-empty category, description, and paramKeys
Every paramKey is a valid key of VisualParams
All 8 VisualParams keys are covered across entries
No duplicate paramKeys across entries
No entry description contains raw identifier terms
Every description is under 80 characters
Every category is under 20 characters
Required categories are present: location, time, device, motion

testFiles.description: Add US-023 integration tests for hint rendering in the overlay, and update US-022 tests affected by p3 replacement

existingTestUpdates.reason: p3 text ('visitor context influences...') is replaced by structured hint list; regex no longer matches

500-char budget test counts all childNodes including hint
    ; scope to

    elements only since hints are structured list not prose

newTests.name: Overlay contains a .eavi-hints element when shown
Hint list has exactly INFLUENCE_HINTS.length <li> items
Each <li> contains a .eavi-hint-category <strong>
Rendered categories match INFLUENCE_HINTS categories
Rendered descriptions match INFLUENCE_HINTS descriptions
No <li> text contains raw identifiers
Hints survive overlay toggle (close and reopen)
.eavi-hints CSS rule is present in document
